svg.title: Graph Instance Lifecycle
svg.desc: Shows instance states from creation through termination, including error conditions referenced in Section 3.2

span.p:
Stuck? See Section 3.2
Pending → check node pool
ImagePullBackOff → check Artifact Registry
CrashLoopBackOff → check pod logs
